title: carex dioica subsp. isogyna
intro: Carex dioica subsp. isogyna, also known as a type of sedge plant, is a perennial grass-like plant belonging to the Carex genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex dioica subsp. isogyna include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as alleviating symptoms of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the roots or leaves in hot water to create a decoction or tea.
